calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar Aug-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: K Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:01 p.m.; and concluded at 2:08 p.m.

George Aposhian, Esq. appeared with and on behalf of Plaintiff Capital One Bank (U.S.A.), N.A. by Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Meagan Cunningham is not present.
Witness for the Plaintiff, Barbara Kurkowski, Litigation specialist and Custodian of Records was present by Zoom Video Conference, was placed under oath and testified.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed June 8, 2021.

Dismissal filed as to Defendant Does 1 to 5 on March 24, 2022.

Motion for Default Judgment Prove Up hearing was filed on January 26, 2023 and served by mail on February 1, 2023.

The Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Declaration of Barbara Kurkowski
Exhibit 2: Declaration of Laura M. D'Anna, Esq.

The matter is submitted.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Capital One Bank (U.S.A.), N.A. and against Defendant Meagan Cunningham as follows:

Damages: $30,384.86
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $558.00
Total Judgment: 30,942.96

Proposed Judgment signed and filed this date.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar Jun-16-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Continued To Aug-18-23 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:25:08 p.m. and concluding at 2:34:06 p.m.

Plaintiff Capital One Bank, N.A. appearing represented by George Aposhian, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Meagan Cunningham not appearing.

BARBARA KURKOWSKI is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

The Corut finds that Plaintiff's witness BARBARA KURKOWSKI is not the Custodian of Records for Plaintiff Capital One Bank, N.A. and dose not have personal knowledge of the facts of the case.

The Court ORDERS the matter continued to August 18, 2023 at 1:30 pm. to allow Plaintiff to produce the custodian of records. (D505)
